events.event_description: Establishment of nonresident envoy relations with Kiribati. William Bodde Jr., Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary (resident in Suva), presented credentials.

evidence.quote: William Jr Bodde, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1980-09-26. Credentials presented: 1981-01-20. Left Suva 1981-08-15.

events.event_description: Elevation from nonresident envoy to nonresident ambassador relations with Kiribati. Fred J. Eckert, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary (resident in Suva), presented credentials.

evidence.quote: Fred J Eckert, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1982-02-11. Credentials presented: 1982-05-31. Left Suva 1984-05-07.
